company.companyDetails: Operating delicate, remote-controlled mechanical butterflies for high-end weddings.

core.companyPitch: Luxury weddings lack truly unforgettable “wow” moments. We deliver precision-controlled butterfly releases that create magical, photo-ready experiences without the unpredictability of live animals.
core.companyRevenue: One-time premium event fee ($2k–$10k per wedding) + upsells (custom choreography, lighting sync).
core.companyAdvantage: Proprietary lightweight RC butterfly tech + synchronized flight choreography system + partnerships with high-end wedding planners.
core.companyInventory: $5–10k prototype budget, engineering partner, 10–15 hrs/week, demo unit, pilot wedding connections.

market.companyCategory: B2C (via wedding planners = indirect B2B channel)
market.companyAlternatives: Live butterfly releases, confetti cannons, drones, or LED effects—none combine elegance + control + symbolism.
market.companyPrice: Premium luxury. Targeting $50k–$250k weddings where uniqueness > cost.
market.companyFriction: Skepticism (will it look fake?), reliability concerns, and planner trust barriers.

tactical.saleChannel: High-end wedding planners + Instagram/TikTok visual demos.
tactical.growthStrategy: Slow luxury brand → expand into global destination weddings.

variables.killCriteria: If reliability drops below 95% or planners don’t adopt after 10+ demos.
variables.biggestFear: Tech failure during live events damaging brand reputation.
